name: Pyrénées-Atlantiques (France)
description: A composite coat of arms in several compartments: upper hoist red with a yellow chain network (Navarre); upper fly yellow with two red cows (Béarn); lower hoist yellow with a red lion holding a sword; a blue panel at centre base bearing a yellow fleur-de-lis; lower fly red with a yellow lion.
history: The flag quarters the arms of Navarre, Béarn, Soule and the Basque provinces that make up the department.

features.role: composite arms of the constituent provinces
